subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! On this day God, exalted be His glory, beareth witness unto those souls who have turned towards the Most Exalted Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی امروز حق جل جلاله شاهد و گواه است از برای نفوسیکه بافق اعلی توجه
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @role and station of women, @high station of the true believer, @thankfulness; gratitude
